items.name: openclaw-api-list
items.description: This GitHub repo is a list of APIs you can plug into your OpenClaw bot to make it run like a powerhouse!

items.name: 5-stage-pipelined-MIPS-RISC-V-like-processor
items.description: A 5-stage pipelined MIPS processor implemented in Verilog featuring hazard detection, data forwarding, and branch handling.

items.name: ComfyUI-FL-PixelGen
items.description: FL PixelGen - Pixel-space diffusion text-to-image generation and LoRA training nodes for ComfyUI

items.name: Human_Typing_Composer
items.description: Enable Chrome to simulate human input when outputting text. Open development syntax.

items.name: perplexity
items.description: Mimic Perplexity with multi-agent framework

items.name: tvbox-Swift
items.description: TVBox-Swift 是一套基于原生 Swift & SwiftUI 构建的跨平台多媒体应用核心工程。它同时支持 macOS 和 iOS 设备，致力于在双端提供无缝、现代且极其流畅的视听体验。

items.name: Langchain-and-AI--LLMs-RAGs-Agents
items.description: This repo have all the notebooks to start learning AI

items.name: etcdedit
items.description: Directly edit Kubernetes resources stored in etcd

items.name: convoker
items.description: Type an app name, press Enter, all its windows come to you. Per-app window control for macOS.

items.name: theNPC
items.description: An LLM-powered NPC world simulation engine — generate worlds, NPCs, quests, and manga panels through natural language conversation.  基于大语言模型的 NPC 世界模拟引擎 —— 通过自然语言对话生成世界、NPC、任务和漫画分镜。

items.name: YT-Downloader
items.description: Terminal-based YouTube downloader for Linux. Download from channels, playlists, or individual videos.

items.name: egydata
items.description: Structured data for Egypt: Governorates, Cities, Area Codes & Timezone helpers. Zero dependencies.

items.name: AsciiLoL
items.description: A Tool Make Images To Ascii And Print It

items.name: webpage2app
items.description: (⌐■_■)Turn any webpage into a desktop app with a single command — perfect for hackers who want to clone webpages and apps.

items.name: SVL-StardewValleyLauncher
items.description: 一站式星露谷物语启动器 · Mod 管理器 · Modpack 工具

items.name: atch
items.description: atch lets you attach and detach terminal sessions

items.name: vynnai-agent
items.description: VYNN AI Agent Backend is a standalone agent execution system for financial analysis. It orchestrates LLM-based agents to scrape historical financial data, build valuation models, analyze real-time financial news, and generate structured financial reports, with a focus on modularity and reproducible execution.

items.name: ByteSentinel
items.description: ByteSentinel is a lightweight file integrity checker written in pure C

items.description: 专为美化 ColorOS 设计的 Xposed 模块

items.name: claude-terminal
items.description: Tabbed terminal manager for Claude Code sessions — run multiple AI coding agents side-by-side with worktree integration, session persistence,  and auto-naming. Built with Electron for Windows.

items.name: fagan-inspection-skill
items.description: Formal Fagan Inspection skill for Claude Code and Codex CLI -- structured multi-domain code review with defect log
